name: planner
description: Personal style-guide plugin for Bruno Chiaramonti's executive planning artifacts (daily + weekly). Provides a dark-mode, typography-first design system (Georgia + Inter, terracota + azul petroleo palette, zero ornament) applied automatically whenever personal planners, daily dashboards, weekly previews, sunday planning or cron-generated HTML are produced. Daily planner uses header 5-zone + body 3-col + footer 2-col (focus on execution). Weekly planner uses 4 bands fit-screen with Orquestra dos 5 dias as hero and Preflight ancorado ao fundo (focus on orchestration). Integrates TrainingPeaks MCP (body metrics), Google Calendar MCP, and ClickUp MCP. Scope is strictly personal artifacts — M7 corporate outputs use different design systems.
